<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="apply_patch"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **apply_patch**</summary>

**Input:**

- explanation: `Add vitest-browser interaction tests for QR code: overlay renders, pattern path present, v-model syncs context, and RootProvider shares updates; include harness components and necessary imports.`
- input:

```
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /Users/elonehoo/Developer/destyler-dev/ui/packages/vue/src/components/qr-code/test/qr-code.test.ts
@@
-import { describe, expect, it } from 'vitest'
-import { render } from 'vitest-browser-vue'
+import { describe, expect, it } from 'vitest'
+import { render } from 'vitest-browser-vue'
+import { page, userEvent } from 'vitest/browser'
+import { defineComponent, ref } from 'vue'
 import { getExports, getParts } from '../../../../../../utils/test'
 import Basic from '../examples/Basic.vue'
+import WithOverlay from '../examples/WithOverlay.vue'
 import { QrCode, qrCodeAnatomy } from '../index'
+import { useQrCode } from '../composables/use-qr-code'
 
 describe('[qr-code] component', () => {
   it.each(getParts(qrCodeAnatomy))('should render part %s', async (part) => {
     render(Basic)
     expect(document.querySelector(part)).toBeInTheDocument()
   })
 
   it.each(getExports(qrCodeAnatomy))('should export %s', async (part) => {
     expect(QrCode[part]).toBeDefined()
   })
+
+  it('should render the pattern path for the provided value', async () => {
+    render(Basic)
+
+    const patternPath = document.querySelector('[data-part="pattern"]')
+    expect(patternPath).toBeInTheDocument()
+    expect(patternPath?.getAttribute('d')).toBeTruthy()
+  })
+
+  it('should render overlay content', async () => {
+    render(WithOverlay)
+
+    await expect.element(page.getByAltText('Ark UI Logo')).toBeInTheDocument()
+  })
 })
+
+describe('[qr-code] interactions', () => {
+  it('should sync v-model updates to the context value', async () => {
+    render(ModelHarness)
+
+    await expect.element(page.getByTestId('current-value')).toHaveTextContent('https://destyler.org/initial')
+
+    await userEvent.click(page.getByTestId('set-value'))
+
+    await expect.element(page.getByTestId('current-value')).toHaveTextContent('https://destyler.org/updated')
+  })
+
+  it('should propagate updates through RootProvider', async () => {
+    render(RootProviderHarness)
+
+    await expect.element(page.getByTestId('provider-value')).toHaveTextContent('https://destyler.org')
+
+    await userEvent.click(page.getByTestId('provider-set'))
+
+    await expect.element(page.getByTestId('provider-value')).toHaveTextContent('https://destyler.dev/new')
+  })
+})
+
+const ModelHarness = defineComponent({
+  name: 'ModelHarness',
+  setup() {
+    const value = ref('https://destyler.org/initial')
+    const setValue = () => {
+      value.value = 'https://destyler.org/updated'
+    }
+
+    return { QrCode, setValue, value }
+  },
+  template: `
+    <div>
+      <button data-testid="set-value" @click="setValue">Set Value</button>
+      <QrCode.Root v-model="value">
+        <QrCode.Context v-slot="ctx">
+          <span data-testid="current-value">{{ ctx.value }}</span>
+        </QrCode.Context>
+        <QrCode.Frame>
+          <QrCode.Pattern />
+        </QrCode.Frame>
+      </QrCode.Root>
+    </div>
+  `,
+})
+
+const RootProviderHarness = defineComponent({
+  name: 'RootProviderHarness',
+  setup() {
+    const qrCode = useQrCode({ defaultValue: 'https://destyler.org' })
+    const setValue = () => qrCode.value.setValue('https://destyler.dev/new')
+
+    return { QrCode, qrCode, setValue }
+  },
+  template: `
+    <div>
+      <button data-testid="provider-set" @click="setValue">Set Provider Value</button>
+      <QrCode.RootProvider :value="qrCode">
+        <QrCode.Context v-slot="ctx">
+          <span data-testid="provider-value">{{ ctx.value }}</span>
+        </QrCode.Context>
+        <QrCode.Frame>
+          <QrCode.Pattern />
+        </QrCode.Frame>
+      </QrCode.RootProvider>
+    </div>
+  `,
+})
*** End Patch
```


</details></tool-use>
